candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing/subtotal helper line, but not the preferred reported total.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, consistent but balance sheet is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet stock at year-end for CHE.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing/subtotal helper line, not preferred when a clean total exists.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Bank loans and issued bonds, current
candidates.why: Clean current borrowings total; best match for short-term debt/current portion of debt and preferable to component maturities.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but likely overlaps with the broader current borrowings line.
Short-term financing item, but appears to be a component rather than the full total.

final_choice.row_label: Bank loans and issued bonds, current

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the clean reported total for current interest-bearing debt. Excluded lease liabilities per instruction and avoided combining with LT Debt due Within 1 Year/Overdraft facilities to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Exact reported PPE total/net line; preferred over gross/component lines.
Gross total and not populated; less suitable than the reported PPE line.
Component/gross line, not total PPE.
Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.
Non-current asset component, not total assets.
Exact net operating cash flow / cash flow from operations line; preferred over pre-working-capital subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not the final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected final net cash flow from operating activities rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
